name: Add a resource
about: Suggest a course, paper, project, organisation, or event to add

labels: ["resource"]
---

## What kind of resource?

- [ ] Course / curriculum
- [ ] Paper / report
- [ ] Open-source project / tool
- [ ] Organisation / lab
- [ ] Event / workshop
- [ ] Dataset
- [ ] Other:

## Resource details

**Title:**
**Author / maintainer:**
**Link:**
**Year:**
**Language(s):** English / Sinhala / Tamil / Other

## Why is this worth including?

(2-4 sentences. What does it cover, and why does it matter for AI safety in Sri Lanka?)

## Where should it go?

(Suggest a section / folder in the repo. If unsure, leave blank.)

## Are you willing to PR it yourself?

- [ ] Yes, I'll open a PR
- [ ] No, please pick this up
